short: 9% of your MRR can vanish each month from silent churn—customers forget they’re paying, not because they hate your product. Fight the subscription trap before it eats your runway. https://saastools.corenk.com/articles/why-saas-churn-rate-so-high
title: Why Is SaaS Churn Rate So High? The Brutal Structural Truth Bootstrapped Founders Can’t Afford to Ignore
